##RRUFFID=R160001
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Cu_5_(SO_4_)_2_(OH)_6_·4H_2_O

##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Eugene Schlepp
##DESCRIPTION=Turquoise colored short-bladed or tabular crystals associated with gypsum microcrystals coating calcite and hemimorphite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
